title: Fix inconsistent validation in the CLI
body:
## Problem Description
The CLI currently has inconsistent validation behavior across different commands or inputs, leading to unexpected errors or silent failures.

## Evidence
This issue is based on the user's instruction and needs repository confirmation to identify specific examples of inconsistent validation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Validate all CLI inputs consistently across commands.
- Ensure clear error messages for invalid inputs.
- Document validation rules for users.

## Risk Level
medium

notes: Draft follows the instruction and avoids unsupported repository claims.
Evidence section appropriately acknowledges lack of repository-specific details.
Acceptance Criteria and Risk Level are clearly defined.
